testcase.name: test_exact_duplicate_check_uses_equals
testcase.failure:
monkeypatch = <_pytest.monkeypatch.MonkeyPatch object at 0x00000211BFFC9A30>
def test_exact_duplicate_check_uses_equals(monkeypatch): schema = { "콘텐츠": {"type": "title"}, "메모": {"type": "rich_text"}, "상태": {"type": "status"}, "생성일": {"type": "date"}, "이미지 필요": {"type": "checkbox"}, "트윗 본문": {"type": "rich_text"}, "원본 URL": {"type": "url"}, } # query_collection은 httpx를 직접 사용하므로 메서드 자체를 mock factory, _holder = make_async_client(schema) monkeypatch.setattr(notion_mod, "AsyncClient", factory)
uploader = bs.NotionUploader(build_default_config())
# 캐시 빌드용 query_collection mock: URL이 포함된 페이지 반환 async def _mock_query(**_kwargs): return {"results": [{"properties": {"원본 URL": {"url": "https://example.com/a"}}}]}
monkeypatch.setattr(uploader, "query_collection", _mock_query)
is_dup = asyncio.run(uploader.is_duplicate("http://example.com/a/?utm_source=x")) > assert is_dup is True E assert False is True
tests_unit\test_notion_accuracy.py:174: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_duplicate_query_error_returns_none_and_error_code
testcase.failure:
monkeypatch = <_pytest.monkeypatch.MonkeyPatch object at 0x00000211C2FCF350>
def test_duplicate_query_error_returns_none_and_error_code(monkeypatch): schema = { "Name": {"type": "title"}, "Summary": {"type": "rich_text"}, "Status": {"type": "status"}, "Created": {"type": "date"}, "Image Required": {"type": "checkbox"}, "Draft": {"type": "rich_text"}, "Source URL": {"type": "url"}, } factory, _holder = make_async_client(schema) monkeypatch.setattr(notion_mod, "AsyncClient", factory)
uploader = bs.NotionUploader(build_default_config())
# query_collection은 httpx를 직접 사용하므로 메서드 자체를 mock async def _raise_query(**_kwargs): raise RuntimeError("query failed")
monkeypatch.setattr(uploader, "query_collection", _raise_query) is_dup = asyncio.run(uploader.is_duplicate("https://example.com/a")) > assert is_dup is None E assert False is None
tests_unit\test_notion_accuracy.py:278: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_duplicate_check_uses_data_source_query
test_spam_filter_regression_still_works
testcase.failure:
def test_spam_filter_regression_still_works(): result = asyncio.run( bs.process_single_post( "https://example.com/a", SpamContentScraper(), StubImageUploader(), draft_generator=StubDraftGenerator(), notion_uploader=StubNotionUploaderNoCall(), ) ) > assert result["success"] is True E assert False is True
tests_unit\test_scrape_failure_classification.py:162: AssertionError
